mainEntity.name: What role does Salt Lake's poor air quality play in proving work causation?
mainEntity.text: What role does Salt Lake's poor air quality play in proving work causation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Community air (F-grade ozone/particles, ALA 2025) sets baseline; prove occupational dose exceeds via modeling or biomonitoring.

suggestedAnswer.text: Inversions amplify claims—use DEQ data. Specialists apportion 50%+ work. Insurers challenge; panels favor specifics. Boosts settlements 15-20%.

name: Using Air Quality Data in Salt Lake Respiratory Claims
description: Community air (F-grade ozone/particles, ALA 2025) sets baseline; prove occupational dose exceeds via modeling or biomonitoring.
